steps.t: Chests with the personal belongings of Addy Rushtuft and Nye Crowfoot can be found at Trader's Wharf. You should search the chests belonging to Addy R…
Enid Nettlesting can be found at Trader's Wharf. You should talk to Enid Nettlesting.
Enid Nettlesting wishes to go to Writhenset to get to the bottom of things. You should talk to Enid Nettlesting in Writhenset.
The entrance to Haudh Eglan can be found in Writhenset. You should enter Haudh Eglan.
The ceremonial coffer can be found in Haudh Eglan. You should return the relics to their proper place in the tomb.
Enid Nettlesting can be found in Writhenset. You should talk to Enid Nettlesting in Writhenset.
Enid Nettlesting wishes to return to Trader's Wharf. You should talk to Enid Nettlesting at Trader's Wharf.
